title: psychotria sonocorova
intro: Psychotria sonocorova, also known as the "Wild Yaw" or "Sarangani", is a species of plant native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's leaves have been used to make herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, to help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and to promote overall health and well-being. Additionally, the plant's medicinal properties have been found to have potential benefits in reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and supporting the immune system.
